section.heading: Special rule
section.chapeau: The Secretary may waive or reduce the non-Federal share required under this subchapter for institutions that—

paragraph.content: are eligible to receive assistance under part A or B of subchapter III or under subchapter V; and
have submitted a grant application under this section that demonstrates a need for a waiver or reduction, as determined by the Secretary.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title VI, § 632, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title VI, § 622, Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3343.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 1132–1, Pub. L. 89–329, title VI, § 632, as added Pub. L. 102–325, title VI, § 601, July 23, 1992, 106 Stat. 737, related to preservation of pre-1992 programs, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 105–244, § 3, title VI, § 604(b), Oct. 7, 1998, 112 Stat. 1585, 1786, effective Oct. 1, 1998.
